title: Changed +
description: Have you ever wanted to play changed in a modpack well i composed a lot of mods for you to play hope you like it.
body:
Looking for a modpack for Changed? Well, here you go!

This modpack aims to enhance Minecraft by fixing common problems such as storage and UI experience, and to balance this, there are new hostile entities and blocks that have special abilities. Some blocks aim to kill you or infect your world. This modpack also adds structures that contain valuable loot to encourage players to explore more, and new biomes that are really dangerous as they are pact full of difficult hostile entities and blocks that will harm the player.

- Note: I will be adding mods 1 by 1, making sure it doesn't crash the modpack (mostly visual stuff, create and apply, and some pvp mods)

I am trying to find a good shadder to. But you can add your own to it  

- Spend any issues or suggestions to the [GitHub](https://github.com/goldrichman9Modded/Changed-/issues)
